title: Cover
excerpt: Cover is protection created by an obstacle or barrier that partially or fully blocks a line of attack or effect.
markdown:
# Cover

Cover is protection created by a barrier, object, terrain feature, or creature that stands between a source and a target. Cover matters when a line of attack or effect is partially or fully blocked.

## What Cover Does

Cover can make a target harder to affect by reducing the source's ability to reach that target cleanly. The amount of protection depends on how much of the target is screened by the obstacle.

## Common Degrees Of Cover

- [[half_cover|Half Cover]] provides partial protection
- [[three_quarters_cover|Three-Quarters Cover]] provides stronger protection
- [[total_cover|Total Cover]] blocks the target completely for many attacks and effects

## Rules Use

Cover is checked between the source of an attack or effect and the target. A creature, wall, object, or terrain feature can provide cover if it interrupts the path between them.

## Cover And Targeting

Some effects can still reach a target behind partial cover, while others fail if the target has total cover. The current geometry of the scene determines whether cover applies when the effect resolves.
